author_revisions_made.disposition: Remove the clause or complete the source, claim, verification, and human-approval lifecycle before teaching it.
author_revisions_made.summary: The current AWS documentation supports the sentence, but no exact approved claim mapped by the lesson contains it.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Explicitly defer destination and delivery prerequisites so successful usable evidence is not inferred.
author_revisions_made.summary: The lesson could imply usable central evidence while the approved recommendation excludes destination and delivery prerequisites.

author_revisions_made.disposition: State all-features and RAM enablement/service-linked-role prerequisites.
author_revisions_made.summary: The approved Organizations all-features prerequisite and required RAM integration path were omitted.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Restore the per-target opt-in linked-Region enablement prerequisite.
author_revisions_made.summary: The approved condition that every intended opt-in linked Region be enabled in each target account was omitted.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Mark the cell satisfies or refine the requirement.
author_revisions_made.summary: The one-account option does not repeat controls account by account even though it fails other requirements.
Per-account Event history requires per-account access and does not satisfy the reduced-administration requirement.
The learner locator repeats the same section label.
Duplicates do not transfer the original resource; each account owns its separate copy.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Mark ownership satisfied while retaining failures for scope and access.
author_revisions_made.summary: A broad cross-account administrator role does not move the resource from the platform account; it fails scope and access requirements instead.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Make Organizations integration, home-Region designation, central-configuration enablement, and policy association explicit.
author_revisions_made.summary: The keyed operation omitted enabling central configuration and designating its home Region.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Use satisfies or not_applicable for the option.
author_revisions_made.summary: The stem establishes target Region enablement before selection, so per-account configuration does not itself violate that condition.

identified_concerns.disposition: Accepted and revised in a new exact-digest immutable revision.
